Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Complaint Of Plaintiff Dennis Estrada And For Further Monetary Sanctions Against Dennis Estrada
Off Calendar Nov-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants Joseph Schoepp, Julianne Schoepp's Motion To Dismiss Complaint Of Plaintiff Dennis Estrada is granted. No opposition has been filed. The court finds that additional orders to respond would not result in compliance. Further monetary sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion To Compel Verified Response To Special Interrogatories From Plaintiff Nohemy Ortega And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants Defendants Joseph Schoepp, Julianne Schoepp's Motion To Compel Verified Response To Special Interrogatories From Plaintiff Nohemy Ortega is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff Nohemy Ortega is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff Nohemy Ortega in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Verified Response To Form And Special Interrogatories From Pltf Nohemy Ortega And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-01-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants JOSEPH SCHOEPP AND JULIANNE SCHOEPP'S Motion To Compel Further Verified Response To Form Interrogatories From Plaintiff Nohemy Ortega is granted. The responses are inadequate. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. The court finds that the responses and the opposition were made without substantial justification. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff and her counsel in the amount of $336.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion To Compel Verified Response To Form And Special Interrogatoies From Pltf Dennis Estrada And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-01-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants JOSEPH SCHOEPP AND JULIANNE SCHOEPP'S Motion To Compel Verified Response To Form Interrogatories From Plaintiff Dennis Estrada is granted. The responses are inadequate. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff is ordered to verify the responses within 15 days of notice of this order. There is no evidence that there is a power of attorney, nor is there any authority offered to support the validity of a verification by a person holding a power of attorney. The court finds that the responses and the opposition were made without substantial justification. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff and his counsel in the amount of $336.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
